abstract_summary: Abstract Background Manual review of 30-day hospital readmissions can identify actionable quality and safety problems, but it is labor-intensive. We developed and evaluated an agentic AI workflow for evidence-grounded readmission review. Materials and methods We studied adult patients with unplanned 30-day readmissi...
citation: Agentic Artificial Intelligence for Hospital Readmission Review: A Single-Center Blinded Evaluation and Exploratory Qualitative Analysis. Michael F. Gensheimer, Rishav Adhikari, Caitlin Parmer, Nancy Liu, Stephen Ma, Lisa Shieh. 2026-06-22. https://doi.org/10.64898/2026.06.17.26355917

relevance.curation_note: Review candidate: useful evidence-grounded review workflow, but it is clinical quality review rather than a general deep-research or AI-scientist system.
